target.title: fix(browser): verify login via ChatGPT session endpoint
target.body:
## Summary

- verify ChatGPT login through the cookie-authenticated `/api/auth/session` endpoint and inspect only whether `user` is present
- keep resolved sessions without a user and plain session-endpoint 401/403 responses authoritative, even when stale authenticated DOM remains visible
- fall back to the legacy `/backend-api/me` probe plus the existing strict composer-and-profile/history DOM signal only when the session endpoint is unavailable
- update focused regression coverage, browser-mode docs, and the 0.13.1 changelog

Closes #241.

This builds on the authenticated-DOM fallback from #216. Thanks @hexsprite for the reproduction and root-cause report, and @orbitingflea for the original fallback groundwork.

## Product decision

`/api/auth/session` user presence is the primary authentication authority. Oracle never returns or logs the endpoint's user, access token, or session token. A resolved empty session fails closed. The legacy probe and strong DOM evidence are compatibility fallback only when the session endpoint cannot provide a decision.

## Live browser proof

Used the exact compiled login-probe expression in an existing authenticated Chrome profile, without submitting a prompt or changing account state. Output was restricted to statuses and booleans:

- real authenticated session with a forced legacy `/backend-api/me` 401: `ok=true`, session 200/user present, legacy result ignored
- resolved empty session against the same authenticated-looking DOM: `ok=false`
- unavailable session endpoint plus legacy 401 and strict authenticated DOM: `ok=true`

The current profile naturally returned 200 from both endpoints, so the reporter's environment-dependent legacy 401 was reproduced by forcing only that legacy response while retaining the real authenticated session response. No token or account value was printed.

## Validation

- `pnpm vitest run tests/browser/pageActions.test.ts` (56 passed, 1 skipped)
- `pnpm test` (136 files passed, 18 skipped; 1,119 tests passed, 41 skipped)
- `pnpm check`
- `pnpm build`
- `pnpm docs:check`
- `git diff --check`
- isolated read-only Codex autoreview: `NO_ACTIONABLE_FINDINGS`
